insight: HookManager.isCitizensLoaded() only probes `net.citizensnpcs.api.ai.tree.Behavior`, but BossAI.registerCitizensTraits() calls `CitizensAPI.getTraitFactory()`. If Citizens fails to enable (corrupted jar, classloader issue), Behavior can resolve while CitizensAPI does not, crashing Boss at startup with NoClassDefFoundError on CitizensAPI. Foundation PR #444 hardens the probe to also check CitizensAPI.
